notes: Root causes: (1) JSON_QUERY wrapper clause — Trino's grammar only allows WITHOUT [ARRAY] WRAPPER; the CONDITIONAL/UNCONDITIONAL modifier is only valid after WITH, but we preserve/emit WITHOUT CONDITIONAL WRAPPER. (2) ALTER TABLE ... SET PROPERTIES — Trino property names must be identifiers; we emit string-literal property names ('foo bar').
